data.title: i-80 Gold advances Ruby Hill with high-grade drilling
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from i-80 Gold Corp ( (TSE:IAU) ).

i-80 Gold Corp. reported on April 8, 2026, that infill drilling at the Upper Archimedes zone on its Ruby Hill property returned high-grade gold intercepts, including 24.6 grams per tonne over 23.6 meters, confirming continuity of mineralization and supporting resource expansion potential. The company has completed about 7,500 meters of drilling, is advancing underground development on schedule with roughly 1,200 meters completed, and is evaluating newly intersected oxide mineralization and a major Lower Archimedes drill campaign to underpin a new resource estimate and feasibility study, aligning with a staged plan targeting first gold from Upper Archimedes in the third quarter of 2026 and a projected 10-year mine life averaging 100,000 ounces of gold annually after ramp-up.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:IAU) stock is a Buy with a C$5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on i-80 Gold Corp stock, see the TSE:IAU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IAU is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by a moderate balance-sheet base and debt reduction. The earnings call was a positive catalyst (financing secured and defined ramp plan), while technicals are mixed and valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on IAU stock, click here.

More about i-80 Gold Corp

i-80 Gold Corp. is a precious metals mining company focused on gold projects in Nevada, with shares listed on the TSX and NYSE American. The company is developing multiple underground operations, including the Archimedes project on its Ruby Hill property, with a strategy to supply ore to its Lone Tree processing plant and leverage third-party toll milling in the interim.

Eletrobrás has released the consolidated distance voting results for its Ordinary General Meeting scheduled for April 15, 2026, covering shareholder decisions on the 2025 financial statements and profit allocation. data.title: Ryanair Confirms EU Investors Hold 30% of Share Capital at March 2026 Year-End
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) has shared an update.

Ryanair Holdings said that as of its financial year end on 31 March 2026, 30% of its issued share capital was held by EU nationals, including citizens of the EU-27, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway and Switzerland. This confirmation follows an earlier update in March 2025 on EU ownership levels.

The airline reiterated that, due to measures introduced on 1 January 2021 to comply with EU ownership and control rules for its EU airline subsidiaries, EU nationals are entitled to exercise 100% of the voting rights in Ryanair Holdings. The disclosure underscores Ryanair’s ongoing efforts to safeguard regulatory compliance and operational continuity for its European airlines in the post-Brexit environment, with implications for shareholding structure and voting power among investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (RYAAY) stock is a Buy with a $80.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ryanair Holdings stock, see the RYAAY Stock Forecast page.

The key offsets are weaker recent free-cash-flow conversion and softer near-term technical momentum, while valuation appears reasonable.

To see Spark’s full report on RYAAY stock, click here.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings is a leading European low-cost airline group based in Ireland, operating short-haul routes across the European Union, the U.K. and surrounding markets. The company focuses on budget air travel through its EU airline subsidiaries, relying on high aircraft utilization, low fares and dense route networks to maintain its competitive position in the regional aviation market.

data.title: Hestia Insight Delays Quarterly SEC Filing
data.description:
Hestia Insight ( (HSTA) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hestia Insight Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the quarter ended February 28, 2026. The company states that the specific quarterly filing is temporarily delayed but remains obligated to comply with standard SEC reporting rules.

The primary reason given for the delay is the need for additional time to compile and review its financial and disclosure information. Management indicates this extra review is required to ensure that all necessary details are properly presented in the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report), rather than due to any disclosed internal control breakdown or auditor dispute.

Hestia Insight expects to file the delayed Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) no later than the fifth calendar day after the original due date. By checking the applicable box, the company has committed to using this short extension window allowed under SEC rules for quarterly reports.

The company does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the same quarter of the prior year. No preliminary numbers or detailed outlook have been provided, and any expectations about unchanged results should be viewed as forward-looking and subject to revision once the full Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) is filed.

Hestia Insight confirms that all other required periodic filings over the past 12 months have been submitted on time, signaling continued baseline compliance with SEC obligations. The notification is signed by Chief Executive Officer Edward Lee on April 14, 2026, underscoring management’s responsibility for the filing and its stated plan to complete the report promptly.

More about Hestia Insight

Hestia Insight Inc. is a U.S. company based in Las Vegas, Nevada. It is a public registrant filing periodic reports with the Securities and Exchange Commission, indicating it operates in regulated capital markets and is subject to ongoing disclosure requirements.

data.title: Galera Announces Obsidian Merger and $350M Financing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Galera Therapeutics ( (GRTX) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 14, 2026, Galera Therapeutics and privately held Obsidian Therapeutics announced a definitive all-stock merger agreement under which both companies will become subsidiaries of a newly formed parent that will operate as Obsidian Therapeutics, Inc. and seek a Nasdaq listing under the ticker “OBX.” At closing, pre-merger Obsidian holders are expected to own about 53.2% of the combined company, pre-merger Galera shareholders about 1.8%, and investors in a concurrent private placement about 45.0%, with Galera’s stake adjustable based on its net cash.

The deal is backed by an oversubscribed $350 million concurrent private placement expected to close immediately before the merger and to fund the combined company into the second half of 2028, including through key OBX-115 data readouts in NSCLC in the first half of 2027 and melanoma by year-end 2027. Existing Galera shareholders will also receive contingent value rights tied to future proceeds from legacy assets, while support and lock-up agreements, board approvals at both companies, and customary closing conditions position the transaction to close by the third quarter of 2026, reshaping Galera as a minority holder in an immuno-oncology-focused platform centered on Obsidian’s engineered TIL pipeline.

Spark’s Take on GRTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GRTX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing operating losses, and limited evidence of sustainable cash generation), despite improved balance-sheet positioning in 2025. Technicals are relatively supportive with an uptrend and positive MACD, while valuation signals are unreliable due to likely non-operating earnings. The corporate event modestly helps by improving capital-structure flexibility but carries dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on GRTX stock, click here.

More about Galera Therapeutics

Galera Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on advancing a pan-NOS inhibitor for patients with the hardest-to-treat forms of advanced breast cancer. The company was previously centered on developing avasopasem, a small molecule dismutase mimetic aimed at reducing chemoradiotherapy toxicities in head and neck cancer patients.

Obsidian Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, MA, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company leveraging its cytoDRiVE protein-regulation platform to develop engineered tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) cell therapies for solid tumors. Its lead candidate, OBX-115, is in Phase 2 trials for advanced melanoma and Phase 1 trials for non-small cell lung cancer and has received Fast Track and RMAT designations in melanoma.

Average Trading Volume: 57,404

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $3.14M

data.title: Perma-Pipe Establishes New $18 Million Credit Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Perma-Pipe International Holdings ( (PPIH) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 8, 2026, Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. entered into a senior secured asset-based revolving credit facility with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. totaling $18.0 million, including a $1.5 million sublimit for letters of credit, maturing on October 7, 2027. The facility is governed by a borrowing base tied to eligible receivables and inventory, carries interest based on either a CB Floating Rate or adjusted term SOFR plus a leverage-linked margin, and includes commitment fees on unused capacity.

The obligations are secured by substantially all assets of the company and certain guarantor subsidiaries, with guarantees provided on a joint and several basis by designated current and future subsidiaries, subject to typical exceptions. The agreement imposes customary covenants limiting additional debt, liens, investments, acquisitions, asset sales, restricted payments, and affiliate transactions, and it features a minimum fixed charge coverage ratio test and standard events of default that allow the lender to accelerate obligations and enforce remedies, influencing the company’s financial flexibility and liquidity management framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (PPIH) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perma-Pipe International Holdings stock, see the PPIH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PPIH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PPIH is a Outperform.

Perma-Pipe International Holdings demonstrates strong financial performance with robust revenue growth and improved cash flow, which are the most significant factors in its overall score. The technical analysis indicates a strong upward trend, though caution is advised due to overbought signals. The valuation is reasonable, supporting the company’s growth prospects. The recent board appointment is a positive but minor factor in the overall assessment.

The company serves customers that require specialized, often large-scale piping infrastructure, positioning it as a niche provider within the broader construction and energy supply chain markets.

data.description:

The latest update is out from Herbalife ( (HLF) ).

On April 14, 2026, Herbalife reported preliminary first-quarter 2026 results showing net sales growth of 7.5% to 8.0% year-over-year, above the high end of prior guidance, with constant-currency growth of 5.0% to 5.5% and adjusted EBITDA expected at or above guidance. Regional performance was led by Asia Pacific, including estimated record quarterly sales in India, while Latin America, Mexico and EMEA grew, and North America and China declined, with North America pressured by severe weather and shipment timing.

The company also detailed an updated senior secured debt refinancing plan targeting $1.45 billion of secured financing, comprising a $425 million revolver, a $225 million Term Loan A and $800 million of other secured debt, aimed at extending its maturity profile. On the same date, subsidiaries launched an $800 million private offering of senior secured notes and issued a conditional notice to redeem their outstanding 12.250% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 at a premium, contingent on successfully raising at least $800 million by April 29, 2026, underscoring an active effort to optimize Herbalife’s capital structure and reduce near-term refinancing risk for creditors and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HLF) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Herbalife stock, see the HLF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HLF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HLF is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed fundamentals: strong and consistent cash generation is offset by deteriorating operating profitability and a structurally weak balance sheet (negative equity). Technicals are moderately supportive with price above key long-term averages, and valuation looks inexpensive on a low P/E. The latest earnings call was broadly positive (return to growth, margin/cash-flow improvement, leverage reduction), but near-term risks remain from China weakness, FX and investment-related margin pressure.

To see Spark’s full report on HLF stock, click here.

More about Herbalife

Herbalife Ltd., listed on the NYSE under ticker HLF, is a global health and wellness company that sells science-backed nutrition products through a network of independent distributors in more than 90 markets. Its direct-selling model emphasizes one-on-one coaching and community support to promote healthier, more active lifestyles and offers a business opportunity to entrepreneurial distributors worldwide.

Founded in 1980, Herbalife positions itself as a premier platform in the nutrition and wellness sector, targeting consumers seeking weight management, sports nutrition and general well-being solutions. The company’s multi-level distribution approach and wide geographic reach make it a significant player in the global direct-selling and functional nutrition industries.

The latest announcement is out from Datasea ( (DTSS) ).

On April 14, 2026, Datasea Inc. announced that its redomicile to the British Virgin Islands via a merger with its wholly owned subsidiary, Datasea Intelligent Technology Ltd., will take effect on April 15, 2026, at which point Datasea Inc. will cease to exist and the subsidiary will become the surviving company. Each existing share of Datasea common stock will convert into one Class A ordinary share of the new BVI entity, except for 2,000,000 shares each held by Zhixin Liu and Fu Liu, which will become Class B ordinary shares, while trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market will continue on April 15, 2026, under the unchanged symbol DTSS with a new CUSIP, signaling a structural shift for shareholders without disrupting market listing.

The reorganization establishes a new share capital structure that preserves one-for-one equity continuity for public investors and concentrates Class B ordinary shares with key insiders, potentially affecting future governance dynamics. By maintaining the DTSS ticker and immediate transition of trading to the new BVI company, the redomicile is structured to minimize operational and market disruption while shifting the company’s legal and regulatory base offshore.

NeuroOne Medical Technologies ( (NMTC) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation filed an amendment to its certificate of incorporation to implement a 1-for-6 reverse stock split of its common stock, following stockholder approval and board authorization at the company’s April 3, 2026 annual meeting. The reverse split will reclassify every six existing shares into one new share, with proportional adjustments to equity incentive plans, stock options and warrants, and cash payments in lieu of fractional shares.

The reverse stock split will take effect at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 15, 2026, and NeuroOne’s shares will begin trading on a split-adjusted basis on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the existing ticker “NMTC” on April 16, 2026, with a new CUSIP number assigned. The move leaves the number of authorized shares and par value unchanged and is expected to uniformly affect all stockholders without altering their relative ownership stakes, aside from minor differences due to the treatment of fractional shares.

data.title: Amazon to Acquire Globalstar to Bolster Satellite Network
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Globalstar ( (GSAT) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 13 and 14, 2026, Amazon and Globalstar announced a definitive agreement under which Amazon will acquire Globalstar through a two-step merger that will leave the satellite operator as a wholly owned Amazon subsidiary. Globalstar shareholders, already effectively approving the deal via a 58% written consent, can elect $90 in cash per share or Amazon stock subject to a 40% cash cap and potential downward adjustment tied to up to $110 million of operational milestone payments, with closing targeted for 2027 pending regulatory and satellite deployment conditions.

The transaction folds Globalstar’s satellites, MSS spectrum, and operations into Amazon’s Leo constellation to build a large-scale direct-to-device network intended to extend voice, text, and data coverage beyond terrestrial reach. In parallel, Amazon and Apple signed an agreement under which Amazon Leo will power current and future satellite services for supported iPhone and Apple Watch models, cementing Globalstar’s role in Apple’s safety and connectivity features while reshaping competition and investment across the satellite and telecom sectors as Amazon commits multibillion-dollar capital to close coverage gaps globally.

The most recent analyst rating on (GSAT) stock is a Buy with a $71.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Globalstar stock, see the GSAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GSAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GSAT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mid-range fundamentals (stronger cash generation and improving operations, but ongoing net losses and higher leverage) and strong technical uptrend/momentum. These positives are partially offset by weak earnings-based valuation (negative P/E, no dividend) and execution/capital intensity risks highlighted on the earnings call (high capex and commitments alongside rising operating expenses).

To see Spark’s full report on GSAT stock, click here.

More about Globalstar

Globalstar is a mobile satellite services operator specializing in non-geostationary orbit constellations, direct-to-device technology, and emergency and critical communications. The company provides satellite connectivity and holds globally authorized MSS spectrum licenses, serving consumer, enterprise, and government customers operating beyond the reach of terrestrial cellular networks.

Globalstar’s existing and next-generation low Earth orbit satellites, combined with its spectrum and ground infrastructure, position it as a key enabler of continuous connectivity and safety services. Its long-standing partnership with Apple underpins satellite features such as Emergency SOS, messaging, location sharing, and roadside assistance on supported iPhone and Apple Watch models.

Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, Microbot Medical announced it would showcase recent commercial milestones that led to the Full Market Release of its LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference, held April 13-16, 2026. CEO Harel Gadot and senior executives planned a live presentation on April 15, 2026, outlining the company’s strategic positioning, growth opportunities and its role in addressing physician radiation risks, physical strain and staffing shortages.

The company noted that LIBERTY, which recently completed a limited U.S. market release before entering full market release earlier that week at the Society of Interventional Radiology Annual Scientific Meeting, is the only FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic system for peripheral endovascular procedures. Microbot also arranged one-on-one meetings with healthcare-focused institutional investors, underscoring rising engagement with healthcare institutions and signaling building commercial momentum around its endovascular robotics platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on transforming endovascular procedures through advanced robotic technology. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution designed to enhance precision, efficiency and safety in peripheral endovascular interventions.

Backed by a substantial intellectual property portfolio, Microbot Medical targets markets with unmet needs such as reducing physician radiation exposure, physical strain and staffing challenges. The company positions itself as a driver of the future of endovascular care, aiming to broaden adoption of robotic systems across healthcare institutions in the U.S. and beyond.
